variants: Living in Everbrook Hollow, Baptiste Garrel was born in Plumridge Crossing. He is celebrated for his invention called the Underwood Search Array, which earned him the prestigious Gemstone Pavilion Distinction. Beyond his technical achievements, Baptiste has a passion for collecting marbles, actively participating in the Aurora Marble Collectors. His endeavors showcase both his inventive spirit and his commitment to engaging with community members who share similar interests.
